twitter_thread: 90% of ESO auto-farm bots follow the same 3 outdated routes, losing 25k gold per week.
Sac-tharan's script earns 12k gold/hr, 40% more than similar bots, by optimizing node spawns.
Peak hours are 7-10pm EST, when 50% of players are online and bot detection is highest.
A 5-minute cooldown between sessions reduces account flags by 80%.
Farming raw materials yields 3x more gold than farming mobs, due to crafting demand.
Daily log analysis shows 20% of bot sessions are wasted on low-yield activities.
What's your average ESO gold earnings per hour with a bot? #esofarm #mmorpg
